chain.thought: Explanation: Counting goals from the "china scorers" column: Qu Bo scored 4 goals (rows on Jan 27, Mar 15, Apr 23, Dec 17). All other players scored 1 or 2 at most. Therefore, the only player with more than 3 goals is Qu Bo.
